generate html and css code for this login page 
### BLACKBOX.AI

`index.html`
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
  <title>Login Page</title>
  <style>
    @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;600&display=swap');

    * {
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    body, html {
      height: 100%;
      margin: 0;
      font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e1e5f6 0%, #bcc4de 100%);
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: center;
      min-height: 100vh;
      padding: 20px;
    }

    .login-container {
      position: relative;
      background-color: #0f1b3f;
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 420px;
      border-radius: 12px;
      box-shadow: 0 16px 24px rgba(18, 24, 74, 0.15);
      padding: 48px 40px 80px;
      color: #cbd1ff;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    /* Wave shape bottom */
    .login-container::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 0;
      left: 0;
      width: 100%;
      height: 85px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, #322f5a 0%, #4e44b1 100%);
      clip-path: polygon(0% 100%, 10% 70%, 20% 85%, 30% 70%, 40% 80%, 50% 70%, 60% 80%, 70% 70%, 80% 85%, 90% 70%, 100% 85%, 100% 100%);
      border-radius: 0 0 12px 12px;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 1;
    }

    h1 {
      font-weight: 600;
      color: #f4f7ff;
      margin: 0 0 6px;
      font-size: 1.6rem;
    }

    p.subtitle {
      font-weight: 400;
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      margin: 0 0 32px;
      color: #a2a9d1;
    }

    .signup-link {
      position: absolute;
      top: 24px;
      right: 36px;
      font-weight: 500;
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      color: #a2a9d1;
      cursor: pointer;
      user-select: none;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      transition: color 0.3s ease;
      z-index: 2;
    }

    .signup-link:hover {
      color: #6159f7;
    }

    .signup-link::after {
      content: "→";
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 1.2rem;
      display: inline-block;
      transform: translateX(0);
      transition: transform 0.3s ease;
    }

    .signup-link:hover::after {
      transform: translateX(4px);
    }

    form {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 20px;
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
    }

    label {
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      color: #a2a9d1;
      margin-bottom: 6px;
      display: block;
    }

    input[type="email"],
    input[type="password"] {
      width: 100%;
      padding: 12px 14px;
      font-size: 1rem;
      border-radius: 6px;
      border: none;
      background-color: #1c285f;
      color: #f4f7ff;
      transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
    }

    input[type="email"]::placeholder,
    input[type="password"]::placeholder {
      color: #6f7db8;
    }

    input[type="email"]:focus,
    input[type="password"]:focus {
      outline: none;
      background-color: #273b92;
    }

    button[type="submit"] {
      margin-top: 8px;
      padding: 12px 0;
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 1rem;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, #7156ff 0%, #573dff 100%);
      color: #fff;
      border: none;
      border-radius: 6px;
      cursor: pointer;
      box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(79, 61, 255, 0.7);
      transition: background 0.3s ease;
    }

    button[type="submit"]:hover {
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, #573dff 0%, #7156ff 100%);
    }

    .forgot-password {
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      color: #545985;
      margin-top: 20px;
      text-align: center;
      cursor: pointer;
      user-select: none;
      transition: color 0.3s ease;
      user-select:none;
    }

    .forgot-password:hover {
      color: #7156ff;
    }

    @media (max-width: 480px) {
      .login-container {
        padding: 40px 28px 70px;
        width: 90vw;
      }

      .signup-link {
        right: 24px;
        top: 18px;
        font-size: 0.8rem;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="login-container" role="main">
    <a href="#" class="signup-link" aria-label="Go to sign up page">Signup</a>
    <h1>Here you can Login</h1>
    <p class="subtitle">Let's join us :)</p>
    <form aria-label="Login form">
      <label for="email">Email</label>
      <input type="email" id="email" name="email" placeholder="user@example.com" autocomplete="email" required />
      
      <label for="password">Password</label>
      <input type="password" id="password" name="password" placeholder="••••••••" autocomplete="current-password" required />
      
      <button type="submit" aria-label="Login to account">LOGIN</button>
    </form>
    <div class="forgot-password" role="link" tabindex="0" aria-label="Forgot your password?">
      Forgot your password?
    </div>
  </div>
</body>
</html>

```
